text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I've found you! ♪ Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion suddenly runs off towards the stands
in the middle of training!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
For the love of... You know you don't have to
come over every time you see me, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look up to see Air Shakur, a highly logical
Umamusume who made her debut before Fine
Motion, in the stands.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But I thought that's why you came here,
Shakur. To see me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You mean you're not collecting data on me
again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a reason she said "again." I've spotted Air
Shakur with her laptop numerous times while Fine
Motion has been training.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Figured you didn't mind since you never said
anything. What, do I need security clearance or
something?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I meant! I'm saying that if you're
going to do that, then we should just train
together!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you'll gather data more
efficiently that way?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but it'll come at the cost of having to engage with you more. No thanks.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Engage? Is that like "going steady"? We don't
have to do that if you don't want to. Let's just
talk!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're her trainer, aren't you? Shouldn't you
teach her not to stick her nose into other people's
business?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Are you kidding?! Doesn't that go without
saying?!
choice_data_list: Then, why are you collecting data on her?
Then, why are you collecting data on her?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Because it's necessary, duh. Accurate numbers
never lie.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
For example, you know about the research
regarding the connection between genes and
race-distance aptitude, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The research she mentions is well-known in the
racing world. It theorizes that you can determine
distance aptitude based on the number of genes
that suppress muscle cells.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
In order to understand that trend, I need a large
number of samples. Numbers are king in this
discussion.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But unlike a certain romanticist, I'm not just in it
for the sake of progress or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I believe everything is predetermined... but simply
following along sounds like a drag. What's the fun
in playing a game when you already know the
ending?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather see what happens when I find a bug in
the system... And to do that, I need all the data I
can get my hands on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And that... includes data on any weird outliers
that might exist.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm? You mean me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why else would I be interested in you? Your
data's got some weird fluctuations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Fluctuations that don't abide by the rules. If I
could just use that to my advantage...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe those seven centimeters would
change. Although, there's no telling if that gap
would shrink or grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seven centimeters... A distance that no doubt
stirs up feelings of despair within Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning the Satsuki Sho, she was on the
verge of taking home her second crown at the
Japanese Derby but lost by a distance of only
seven centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She later won the Kikuka Sho and became a
Double Crown champion, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Data doesn't lie... What it says, goes. What
better proof do you need than this?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those were the only words she muttered at her
post-race press conference before leaving the
podium.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Damn it. I've said too much.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What? If you say something idiotic, I'll knock
some sense into you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Or could it be that the ever-merciful princess
desires some kind of compensation for the data
I've collected?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I don't care about the data. I just...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'd just like to talk with you a little more.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No thanks. How about you chitchat with your
trainer over there?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! ...Make sure you keep an eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I mean, don't let her just fool around aimlessly...
duh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your job is to keep her running right up until the
very end.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur never changes, does she? She certainly
has a unique way of communicating.
choice_data_list: You like that about her, right?
You like that about her, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, can you tell?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Shakur is different from everyone
else I've grown close to at this academy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not just how she acts—though I do love that
aspect of her, of course.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the biggest thing is... that I can respect
her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even if it only leads her to despair, she'll never
stop analyzing and theorizing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention how cool and clever she is. How
could I not like her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's certainly a sense of respect emanating
from Fine Motion as she talks about Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But how does Air Shakur feel? She seems to have
taken interest in Fine Motion's inherent ability
and analyzing her, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And that... includes data on any weird outliers
that might exist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps she sees something in Fine
Motion—something more than just fluctuations in
data.
